mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( payment_no, order_id, channel, status, amount, pay_url, code_url, channel_trade_no, expire_time, paid_time, close_time, fail_reason, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{paymentNo}, #{orderId}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{payUrl}, #{codeUrl}, #{channelTradeNo}, #{expireTime}, #{paidTime}, #{closeTime}, #{failReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING') ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = 'SUCCESS', channel_trade_no = #{channelTradeNo}, paid_time = #{paidTime}, update_time = #{paidTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
UPDATE payment SET status = 'FAILED', fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
